text: Project opened: Builder tools cleanup

Project opened 2026-07-03, replacing the stale builder-kit board. Done so far: PR #5000 (CLAUDE.md fix) merged into big-agents and deployed to the local dev stack (sidecar + compose runner restarted; agenta-oss-team shared stack still runs a pre-fix baked image).
Thread opened: Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)
Task added: Review + align builder tools: 19 in-Agenta platform ops vs 13 build-agent skill scripts
Task 'Review + align builder tools: 19 in-Agenta platform ops vs 13 build-agent skill scripts': status=running

Task 'Review + align builder tools: 19 in-Agenta platform ops vs 13 build-agent skill scripts': status=in-review (Review doc written: docs/design/agent-workflows/projects/builder-agent-reliability/tools-review/README.md. Verdict: cut 7 of 19 inside tools from the default overlay, rename discover ops, add a new test_run op + endpoint. Doc was briefly wiped by a concurrent session's oplog restore and recovered from the snapshot.)
Thread 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': summary updated
Decision needs you: Build-kit overlay: static 8-tool core, or conditional event pack?
Decision needs you: test_run op: sync with duration cap, and does it accept a delta?
Decision needs you: Rename find_capabilities/find_triggers to discover_tools/discover_triggers?
Decision needs you: Ship query_spans stopgap read op now, or hold for test_run?

Tools review landed. Doc: docs/design/agent-workflows/projects/builder-agent-reliability/tools-review/README.md. Recommends 19 -> 12 visible tools, two renames, a new test_run op (needs one new endpoint), and a query_spans stopgap. 4 decisions open. Also flagged: builder-of-other-agents (create_workflow) parked as a backlog question.

Answered 'Rename find_capabilities/find_triggers to discover_tools/discover_triggers?': let's hard migrate. As I always keep telling you, we are still pre-production we dont give a shit about backward compatibility. Let's add this to the decision list, since later we are going ot push many in one pr

Message on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': ok thank you for looking into this. can you please spin off a subagent to break this into part 1 about external tools and recommendations and part 2 about internal tools. Also, for missing internla tools that are not platform tools since they include logic, we can have them as gateway tools no?
Message on task 'Review + align builder tools: 19 in-Agenta platform ops vs 13 build-agent skill scripts': I thinnk this is redundant
Decided (locked): Rename find_capabilities/find_triggers to discover_tools/discover_triggers?

Task 'Review + align builder tools: 19 in-Agenta platform ops vs 13 build-agent skill scripts': status=done (Agreed, the task duplicates thread CLE-1; closing the task, the thread stays the live surface. Review doc is being split into part-1-external-tools.md and part-2-internal-tools.md per your ask.)

Reply on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': Split in progress via subagent. On your gateway question: gateway tools route to external provider actions through the connections system and cannot carry the $ctx self-targeting bindings that keep platform ops safe, so test_run stays a platform op wrapping one new /api endpoint (full section added to part 2). Note: your answers to overlay-scope, test-run-shape and spans-stopgap did not survive on disk (concurrent-session restore loop); only op-renames landed. Please re-answer those three.
Task added: Fix agenta-skills PR #1: demote 2 scripts, add create-subscription.sh + update-agent.sh, document schedule inputs
Task 'Fix agenta-skills PR #1: demote 2 scripts, add create-subscription.sh + update-agent.sh, document schedule inputs': status=running
Task added: plan-feature: build-kit-tools-cleanup design workspace + docs-only draft PR
Task 'plan-feature: build-kit-tools-cleanup design workspace + docs-only draft PR': status=running

Reply on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': All [[comments]] folded into part 1 and part 2. External PR fix and the internal plan-feature workspace are both running; the plan lands as a docs-only draft PR for your review.

Task 'Fix agenta-skills PR #1: demote 2 scripts, add create-subscription.sh + update-agent.sh, document schedule inputs': status=in-review (Done and live-tested on the lab deployment: list-connections.sh + annotate-trace.sh demoted to scripts/extras/, create-subscription.sh added (full end-to-end: created + deleted a real Slack-event subscription), update-agent.sh added (verified commit -> new revision with config preserved), trigger-inputs.md documents the inputs_fields semantics. 3 commits pushed, PR #1 body has a Review round 2 section. Ready for Mahmoud's review.)

Task 'plan-feature: build-kit-tools-cleanup design workspace + docs-only draft PR': status=in-review, pr (Design workspace complete (8 docs) and landed as draft PR #5060 (docs-only, base big-agents, lane docs/build-kit-tools-cleanup). Recommendation: Option C, a PlatformOp handler mode on the existing tool-call plane (callRef), keeping the resource API atomic. Notable finding: three of the four authoring skills appear never delivered by the overlay (attach bug suspected). Two files (context.md, research.md) temporarily ride in #5041 pending a hand-off. Ready for Mahmoud.)

Reply on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': Draft PR #5060 is up (docs-only). Review focus: tool-home-options.md (Option C), plan.md slice ordering vs the approval-boundary lane, and the three open decisions in status.md. The external PR #1 in agenta-skills is also ready.
Decided (locked): Rename find_capabilities/find_triggers to discover_tools/discover_triggers?
Task added: Implement build-kit-tools-cleanup (6 slices, one PR): renames, overlay cuts, query_spans, skills port, test_run handler mode, rename-or-defer
Task 'Implement build-kit-tools-cleanup (6 slices, one PR): renames, overlay cuts, query_spans, skills port, test_run handler mode, rename-or-defer': status=running

Reply on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': Implementation kicked off 2026-07-04 after Mahmoud's go-ahead. Deliverable: one draft PR to big-agents with inline review-guide comments.

Task 'Fix agenta-skills PR #1: demote 2 scripts, add create-subscription.sh + update-agent.sh, document schedule inputs': status=done (PR #1 and follow-up PR #2 (invoke-contract alignment) both merged by Mahmoud.)

Implementation progress: slices 1-2 committed (cf0d269, 8eb2068: renames+sweep script, overlay cut to explicit defaults), slices 3-4 committed (ca65d91: query_spans op with drift contract test, single build-an-agent playbook replacing the three skills). One review blocker caught and fixed pre-commit (query_spans schema/endpoint mismatch that would have silently verified runs that never happened). Slice 5a (test_run SDK+API half) being written by Codex xhigh now; 5b (runner half) waits on the pi-builtin-gating WIP; slice 6 rename deferred per Codex advice. Lane feat/build-kit-tools-cleanup stacked on the docs lane, pushed and verified.

Task 'Implement build-kit-tools-cleanup (6 slices, one PR): renames, overlay cuts, query_spans, skills port, test_run handler mode, rename-or-defer': updated (Slices 1-4 committed+pushed. 5a in progress, 5b blocked on runner surface, 6 deferred. Next: 5a review, e2e debug loop, test matrix, docs sync, PR.)

Task 'Implement build-kit-tools-cleanup (6 slices, one PR): renames, overlay cuts, query_spans, skills port, test_run handler mode, rename-or-defer': status=in-review, pr (Draft PR #5068 up (stacked on the docs lane): slices 1-5a all committed, live-verified end to end, 7 inline review-guide comments, CodeRabbit triggered. One exclusion: the 4-file resolver seed fix cannot commit while #5002's lane holds the same resolver region (hand-off filed; unblock = merge #5002 or restack). 5b (runner half) and the gateway rename are filed as defer-todos.)

Reply on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': PR #5068 is ready for review with inline review guides. The three assumed decisions (static-13 overlay, sync+delta test_run, query_spans now) are flagged in the body. The resolver seed fix is in the working tree but needs #5002 merged (or a restack) before it can commit; a correction comment on the PR marks it.

Task 'Implement build-kit-tools-cleanup (6 slices, one PR): renames, overlay cuts, query_spans, skills port, test_run handler mode, rename-or-defer': status=done (MERGED to big-agents (1756d3d838): #5060 (design) + #5068 (implementation, 40 files). Final round: CodeRabbit 5 fixes incl. SSRF delta confinement, org pass, seed fix, builtin-grants fix from live QA (custom tools strip Pi read -> skills unloadable), test pin. Deferred: 5b runner half (open-issues), gateway rename. test_run flag-gated OFF until 5b.)

Reply on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': Merged. Remaining follow-ups live in scratch/open-issues.md: slice 5b (runner callRef dispatch + overlay flip + flag default-on) and the gateway->server label rename. Two observations parked: sidecar sessions-persist 401s, transcript tool-call arg fidelity.

Build-kit tools cleanup shipped. The playground builder agent now gets: read/bash + 12 ops + request_connection + one playbook skill, verified end to end with a real model driving it (discovery, self-commit approval pause, query_spans verify recipe).
Task added: test_run 5b: runner half (callRef dispatch, ctx injection after permission verdict, timeoutMs, run-kind header, overlay flip)
Task 'test_run 5b: runner half (callRef dispatch, ctx injection after permission verdict, timeoutMs, run-kind header, overlay flip)': status=running
Task added: Fix: sidecar sessions-persist 401s (cred=MISSING); child invokes lose trace_id
Task 'Fix: sidecar sessions-persist 401s (cred=MISSING); child invokes lose trace_id': status=running
Task added: Fix: batch transcript records partial streamed tool-call args instead of final
Task 'Fix: batch transcript records partial streamed tool-call args instead of final': status=running
Three threads running: test_run 5b (plan -> implement -> live debug -> PR) and the two small bugs (sidecar persist 401s, fold arg fidelity), each driving to its own PR.

Task 'test_run 5b: runner half (callRef dispatch, ctx injection after permission verdict, timeoutMs, run-kind header, overlay flip)': status=in-review, pr (Draft PR #5074 (30 files, 3 commits): callRef dispatch with post-verdict ctx injection + approval-record redaction, per-spec timeout with grace at both deadlines, run-kind recursion header, overlay armed (13 ops) + flag default-on kill switch, playbook teaches test_run. Adversarially reviewed (all 8 attacks hold) and live-verified: full approval loop via the real playground resume path, recursion 400 both entries, 76s child passes / 130s fails clean, synergy with the two bug fixes confirmed. Env findings: sidecar CMD lacks extension build (recipe note rides #5073 lane), dev DB session-table schema drift.)

Task 'Fix: batch transcript records partial streamed tool-call args instead of final': status=in-review, pr (PR up: two-layer fix (runner event refresh + SDK fold merge-by-id), failing-first tests, live verified.)

Task 'Fix: sidecar sessions-persist 401s (cred=MISSING); child invokes lose trace_id': status=in-review, pr (PR up: register_handler replace=True (the #5064 static seed silently shadowed the real composed handler); fixed 401s + trace_id=None + gating bypass in one; live verified.)

Reply on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': All three PRs are up with review guides and CodeRabbit triggered. 5b was adversarially reviewed (injection confinement and the recursion loop traced in code) before the live matrix.

Task 'test_run 5b: runner half (callRef dispatch, ctx injection after permission verdict, timeoutMs, run-kind header, overlay flip)': status=done (MERGED (#5074, merge 2d02021). Conditional lgtm satisfied with a fresh same-day e2e. GitHub's merge cache wedged on a phantom conflict; the identical clean merge commit was minted locally and pushed.)
Task 'Fix: batch transcript records partial streamed tool-call args instead of final': status=done (MERGED (#5072, f0b0c13) after verifying Mahmoud's two conditions (harness-generic, live-tested).)

Task 'Fix: sidecar sessions-persist 401s (cred=MISSING); child invokes lose trace_id': status=done (Superseded by JP's #5081 (same root cause, simpler always-replace + ambient tracing). Lane reverted to merged semantics; #5073 retitled to a docs-only sidecar-recipe PR (+13 lines) awaiting a quick yes/no. The LOCAL tracing outage had a second cause: pre-#5061 stack ran 7 crash-looping old workers so nothing consumed spans + DB schema drift; fixed live, then the stack was recreated cleanly (data preserved, consolidated workers ingesting, smoke green).)

Reply on 'Clean up + standardize builder tools (inside Agenta vs build-agent skill)': Everything from the session is merged or awaiting one small yes/no (#5073 docs-only). Local stack is healthy: consolidated workers live, tracing verified end to end, sub-sidecar reconnected.
